description: Part 4/10: Add the seq_state update function (f_update_seq), pattern calculation function (f_calculate_patterns), and multi-timeframe data retrieval using iOpen/iHigh/iLow/iClose/iTime for all 25 timeframes.
steps: Implement UpdateSeq() function - exact translation of f_update_seq with all step transitions (0->1->2->3->4->5), level tracking, timeout check (5 candle timeout), and counter pattern detection

Implement CalculatePatterns() function - exact translation of f_calculate_patterns. Takes index and OHLCT data for current bar, previous bar, and 2-bars-ago. Detects: bear_x3, bull_x3, sn_bear, sn_bull, bear_first_em, bull_first_em, bear_laol_first, bull_laol_first, fu_bear_em, fu_bull_em, bear_laol_candle (inside bar), bull_laol_candle. Sets all detection arrays.

Implement GetTFData() function - retrieves OHLCT data for a specific timeframe using iOpen(), iHigh(), iLow(), iClose(), iTime() with proper bar shifting ([0], [1], [2] bars). Handles the isConfirmed equivalent by checking if the bar time has changed.
Add timeframe confirmation tracking - maintain previous bar times per TF to detect new confirmed bars (equivalent of barstate.isconfirmed in request.security)
Add the main data retrieval loop that calls GetTFData() for all 25 timeframes and then calls CalculatePatterns() for each (with soft_start check for INTRA TFs 16-24)
Commit and push with message 'feat: STX Edge MT5 Part 4/10 - Pattern detection and MTF data retrieval'
acceptance_criteria: UpdateSeq() correctly implements all 6 states (0-5) with proper transitions
CalculatePatterns() detects all pattern types: X3 (bear/bull), SN, First EM, LAOL first, FU, inside bar
Multi-timeframe data is correctly retrieved for all 25 TFs
Bar confirmation logic properly identifies new confirmed bars on each timeframe
verification: Read the UpdateSeq and CalculatePatterns functions and compare logic to Pine Script original
Verify iOpen/iHigh/iLow/iClose calls use correct timeframe enums and bar indices
findings: Added 312 lines. UpdateSeq implements all 6 states (0-5) with proper transitions matching Pine f_update_seq. CalculatePatterns detects X3 (bear/bull), SN, First EM, LAOL first, FU, inside bar. GetTFData retrieves data using iOpen/iHigh/iLow/iClose/iTime with bar confirmation via g_prev_tf_time tracking. RetrieveAllTFData processes all 25 TFs with soft_start gating for INTRA (idx 16-24). File now 1476 lines.
